notes: Palbociclib + letrozole vs placebo + letrozole, 1L postmenopausal HR+/HER2- ABC. ER+ required; no prior systemic therapy for advanced disease; CDK4/6i excluded; DFI >12mo from adjuvant letrozole/anastrozole required.

BOLERO-6 phase 2: everolimus+exemestane vs everolimus alone vs capecitabine in ER+ ABC after NSAI failure. Eligibility text sparse; HER2- not explicitly stated in the excerpt but trial context is HR+/HER2-. >1 prior chemo line excluded; prior exemestane/mTOR/PI3K/AKT excluded.

BRAVO phase 3: niraparib vs physician's choice in germline BRCA1/2 HER2- mBC; mixed HR+/HR-. HR+ subjects required endocrine resistance (relapse on/within 12mo of adjuvant ET or progression on >=1 line of ET for advanced). Niraparib is a PARPi but is not in the canonical drug-class list (which only lists olaparib and talazoparib); used 'investigational (other)' per protocol guidance with note. Up to 2 prior cytotoxic lines for advanced disease allowed.

PALOMA-3: palbociclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- mBC progressed within 12mo of adjuvant ET or 1mo of advanced ET. Any menopausal status (premenopausal must be on LHRH agonist). Prior CDK inhibitor, fulvestrant, everolimus, PI3K-mTOR agents excluded.

MONALEESA-2: ribociclib + letrozole vs placebo + letrozole in 1L postmenopausal HR+/HER2- advanced BC. No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for advanced disease. Prior CDK4/6i excluded. Adjuvant letrozole/anastrozole permitted if DFI >12mo.

OlympiAD: olaparib vs physician's choice chemo in gBRCA1/2 HER2- mBC; both HR+ and TNBC. HR+ patients required to have received and progressed on >=1 endocrine therapy (or deemed inappropriate). HER2+ excluded. Up to 2 prior chemo lines for mBC allowed; prior PARPi excluded.

Out of scope: investigational androgen-receptor antagonist (enzalutamide) + exemestane in postmenopausal ER+/PR+ HER2-normal ABC. Up to 1 prior hormone and 1 prior chemo in advanced setting allowed. No canonical drug-class match.

MONARCH 2: abemaciclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- ABC progressed on neo/adjuvant ET or on 1L ET in metastatic. No more than 1 line of endocrine and no prior chemo for metastatic disease. Pre/perimenopausal allowed with ovarian suppression.

Out of scope: entinostat (HDAC inhibitor) + exemestane vs placebo + exemestane in HR+/HER2- locally advanced/metastatic BC. HDAC inhibitor + AI is investigational; no canonical drug-class in the protocol's class list.

MONARCH 3: abemaciclib + NSAI (anastrozole/letrozole) vs placebo + NSAI in 1L postmenopausal HR+/HER2- locoregionally recurrent or metastatic BC. No prior endocrine or chemo for advanced disease; DFI >12mo from neo/adjuvant ET required; prior everolimus or CDK4/6i excluded.

Out of scope: radium-223 added to exemestane + everolimus in bone-dominant HR+/HER2- mBC after progression on NSAI; >=1 prior endocrine line in metastatic setting required; prior everolimus excluded; chemo for metastatic excluded. Investigational backbone — no canonical class match (everolimus + exemestane is the comparator backbone, not the experimental arm).

MONALEESA-7: ribociclib + tamoxifen/NSAI + goserelin vs placebo + ET in premenopausal/perimenopausal HR+/HER2- advanced BC. No prior hormonal anti-cancer therapy for advanced BC (<=14d NSAI/tamoxifen allowed). Prior CDK4/6i excluded. Postmenopausal excluded.

SANDPIPER: taselisib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in postmenopausal ER+/HER2- locally advanced/metastatic BC with recurrence/progression on or within 12mo of adjuvant AI or progression on/within 1mo of advanced AI. Central PIK3CA cobas testing required. Prior fulvestrant, PI3K/mTOR/AKT excluded; prior >1 cytotoxic chemo for mBC excluded.

Out of scope: HER2-positive trial. DETECT V randomises HER2+/HR+ mBC patients to dual HER2 blockade (trastuzumab + pertuzumab) plus either endocrine therapy or chemotherapy, with ribociclib added in a substudy. Population is HER2-positive — out of scope for HR+/HER2- mBC.

MONALEESA-3: ribociclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- advanced BC. Enrols both treatment-naive (1L) and patients who progressed after one line of ET (2L). Prior fulvestrant, chemo for advanced, or any CDK4/6i excluded.

SOLAR-1: alpelisib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- mBC with recurrence/progression on or after AI. Two cohorts by PIK3CA status (mutant and wild-type); primary endpoint in PIK3CA-mutant cohort. Prior chemo for advanced, fulvestrant, PI3K/mTOR/AKT inhibitors excluded; prior CDK4/6i allowed.

Out of scope (no canonical drug-class match): chidamide (HDAC inhibitor) + exemestane vs placebo + exemestane in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- advanced BC after >=1 prior endocrine therapy; up to 1 prior chemo allowed; <=4 prior therapies total. Prior exemestane excluded.

Out of scope: IMP321/eftilagimod alpha (LAG-3 agonist, biological) + paclitaxel vs placebo + paclitaxel as 1L chemo in ER+/PR+ metastatic BC; HER2+ candidates for trastuzumab excluded (so effectively HER2-). No prior chemo for mBC; DFI >12mo from adjuvant chemo. CDK4/6i washout required. Investigational immunomodulator — no canonical drug-class.

Out of scope (phase 2 dose-finding/multi-arm): nextMONARCH 1 compared abemaciclib monotherapy at two doses vs abemaciclib + tamoxifen in heavily pretreated HR+/HER2- mBC (>=2 chemo regimens total, 1-2 in metastatic setting; relapsed/progressed on endocrine therapy). Prior CDK4/6i excluded. Drug class does not cleanly map to a canonical post-CDK4/6i label (CDK4/6i-naive heavily pretreated); flagged as investigational.

MONARCH plus: abemaciclib + NSAI (Cohort A, 1L endocrine-naive in advanced) and abemaciclib + fulvestrant (Cohort B, post-endocrine progression) vs placebo arms in HR+/HER2- ABC. Lead/Cohort A drug class is CDK4/6i + AI; Cohort B is CDK4/6i + fulvestrant. Prior CDK4/6i excluded.

Metronomic capecitabine + AI vs AI in first-line HR+/HER2- mBC; excludes patients who progressed within 2 years of adjuvant endocrine. No prior systemic therapy for metastatic disease allowed. Closest canonical drug class is chemotherapy single agent (combined with AI) - not a perfect match.

Palbociclib + AI or fulvestrant in first or later line; CDK4/6i-naive required. No more than 1 prior palliative chemo allowed. Combo partner could be AI or fulvestrant; lead arm taken as CDK4/6i + AI.

Ribociclib + letrozole (+/- goserelin) first-line in HR+/HER2- advanced BC; no prior systemic hormonal therapy for advanced disease, no prior CDK4/6i. Up to 1 prior chemo for metastatic disease permitted.

First-line palbociclib + AI, with switch to fulvestrant on emergence of ESR1 mutation by ctDNA. ESR1mut subgroup is pre-specified. No prior systemic therapy for metastatic disease, no prior CDK4/6i in adjuvant or metastatic.
Ribociclib + letrozole (+ goserelin if pre/peri) for HR+/HER2- aBC. Up to 1 prior chemo and up to 2 prior endocrine therapies for advanced disease permitted; no prior CDK4/6i or mTORi.

Palbociclib + fulvestrant +/- avelumab after progression on prior CDK4/6i + endocrine. Required >=6 months on prior CDK4/6i + endocrine. 0-1 prior cytotoxic chemo lines in metastatic; 1-2 prior endocrine lines in metastatic. No prior fulvestrant.
Everolimus + exemestane in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- aBC refractory to non-steroidal AIs. <=1 prior chemo line for ABC allowed; no prior mTOR inhibitor.

Ipatasertib + paclitaxel in PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN-altered TNBC or HR+/HER2- aBC. Enrolls both TNBC and HR+/HER2- cohorts (HR+ subgroup pre-specified). No prior chemo for inoperable LA/metastatic disease. HR+ patients must not be appropriate for endocrine-based therapy; prior Akt inhibitor not allowed.

SONIA randomizes 1L vs 2L CDK4/6i in HR+ aBC (NSAI then fulvestrant +/- CDK4/6i). Untreated for metastatic disease (chemo not indicated). HER2 status not explicitly stated in extracted inclusion text - inferred HER2- from clinical context but flagged as null per protocol strictness.

Core phase: ribociclib + letrozole 1L in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- aBC. Extension: alpelisib + fulvestrant in 2L for PIK3CA-mutant patients after progression on core. Molecular/PIK3CA pre-specified. Lead/core arm taken as CDK4/6i + AI.

Entinostat (HDAC inhibitor) + exemestane vs placebo + exemestane in HR+/HER2- LA/mBC in Chinese patients. At least one prior endocrine therapy other than exemestane required; <=1 prior chemo for metastatic. No canonical drug-class for HDACi + endocrine - assigned 'investigational (other)'.

Ribociclib + letrozole/anastrozole (+/- goserelin) in Chinese pre- and postmenopausal HR+/HER2- aBC. Premenopausal cohort allows up to 1 prior chemo for advanced disease; postmenopausal cohort requires no prior systemic therapy for advanced BC. No prior CDK4/6i.

T-DXd vs TPC in HER2-low (IHC 1+ or 2+/ISH-) unresectable/metastatic BC, HR+ or HR-. 1-2 prior lines of chemo in recurrent/metastatic setting; progressed on endocrine therapy (HR+ subgroup). HR+ subgroup pre-specified.

Elacestrant vs SOC (fulvestrant or AI) in ER+/HER2- aBC after 1-2 lines of endocrine and prior CDK4/6i + endocrine in metastatic setting. <=1 prior chemo line in advanced setting allowed. ESR1mut subgroup pre-specified.
Ribociclib (two dose levels) + AI (anastrozole or letrozole) +/- goserelin in 1L HR+/HER2- aBC. No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for aBC (incl. endocrine, chemo, CDK4/6i).
Ribociclib + NSAI + goserelin vs combination chemotherapy in pre/perimenopausal HR+/HER2- aBC with aggressive disease (visceral crisis criteria). No prior systemic therapy for aBC; no prior CDK4/6i.
Sacituzumab govitecan vs TPC in HR+/HER2- MBC after 2-4 prior chemo regimens for metastatic disease, at least 1 taxane, at least 1 prior endocrine, and at least 1 prior CDK4/6i.

Out of scope: HER2-positive trial - pyrotinib + trastuzumab + AI in HER2+/HR+ mBC. Closest canonical class is HER2-ADC (other) for routing; downstream filter should exclude based on out-of-scope flag.

Dalpiciclib (SHR6390, CDK4/6i) + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- LR/mBC after prior endocrine therapy. Up to 1 prior chemo line for advanced/metastatic permitted. No prior CDK4/6i, everolimus, or fulvestrant.
Dalpiciclib (SHR6390) + letrozole or anastrozole vs placebo + AI in 1L HR+/HER2- locally recurrent or metastatic BC. No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for advanced HR+ disease; no prior CDK4/6i.

trial_name: Palbociclib + AI in HR+/HER2- locally advanced BC (China)
notes: Sparse eligibility text. Postmenopausal HR+/HER2- locally advanced BC; eligibility silent on prior therapy lines so prior-state fields left null.

Amcenestrant monotherapy vs endocrine monotherapy. Prior CDK4/6i mandatory in main study (Chinese cohort exception capped at 20%); secondary endocrine resistance required; up to 1 prior chemo allowed in advanced setting.

Dose-finding/phase 1/2 of ARV-471 (vepdegestrant, oral PROTAC ER degrader, classified under SERD oral). Multi-part trial with both monotherapy and palbociclib-combination arms; chose SERD oral as the lead class. All parts require prior endocrine and CDK4/6i in advanced setting.

1L trial in PIK3CA-mut HR+/HER2- with progression during/within 12 mo of adjuvant endocrine; any prior systemic therapy for metastatic disease excluded. Pre-/peri-/post-menopausal eligible with LHRH for premeno.

Camizestrant (AZD9833) vs fulvestrant in postmenopausal ER+/HER2- ABC. Progression on at least 1 prior endocrine therapy; up to 1 prior endocrine and 1 prior chemo for advanced disease; prior CDK4/6i permitted; no prior fulvestrant/oral SERD. ESR1mut subgroup pre-specified in primary publication.

Maintenance phase III after first-line chemo. Excludes prior endocrine therapy for advanced disease and patients with relapse within 2 years of adjuvant endocrine. Fulvestrant maintenance arm classified as endocrine therapy alone (Capecitabine arm is chemotherapy single agent comparator).

Capivasertib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant after AI; up to 2 prior endo lines and 1 prior chemo allowed in advanced setting; prior fulvestrant/SERDs and AKT/PI3K/mTOR inhibitors excluded. AKT-pathway (PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN) subgroup pre-specified.
T-DXd vs investigator chemo in HER2-low or HER2 IHC >0<1+ (ultralow) HR+ mBC; no prior chemo for advanced disease. Progression within 6 mo of 1L ET+CDK4/6i or after >=2 prior endocrine lines.

Out of scope: investigational CDK4/6i (XZP-3287) phase 1/2 with dose-escalation, combination cohort (with AI/fulvestrant), and post-multi-line monotherapy cohort. Mixed populations and prior-line requirements differ across cohorts; CDK4/6i-naive required. No canonical class fit; flagged investigational.

Giredestrant + palbociclib vs letrozole + palbociclib in 1L ER+/HER2- aBC. No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for advanced disease; relapse during/within 12 mo of adjuvant CDK4/6i excluded; prior SERD excluded.

Letrozole +/- metronomic capecitabine 1L study. Excludes progression on prior AI and primary endocrine resistance; enrolls de novo metastatic or secondary tamoxifen resistance. Drug class set to endocrine therapy alone (lead arm comparator); experimental arm adds metronomic capecitabine to letrozole with no canonical class fit.

Giredestrant vs physician's-choice endocrine monotherapy after 1-2 lines of systemic therapy in advanced setting (not more than 1 prior targeted therapy). Prior fulvestrant allowed with washout; other SERDs excluded. ESR1mut subgroup reported.

Asian phase 3 of sacituzumab govitecan vs TPC in HR+/HER2- mBC after >=2 (max 4) prior chemo regimens for metastatic disease; >=1 prior taxane and >=1 prior endocrine therapy required (any setting). Mirrors TROPiCS-02 design.

Ipatasertib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant after PD on first-line CDK4/6i + AI; pre-meno require LHRH ovarian suppression. Prior fulvestrant/SERD/PI3K/AKT/mTOR inhibitors excluded. CDK4/6i+AI must be most recent treatment.

Camizestrant (AZD9833) + palbociclib vs anastrozole + palbociclib in 1L ER+/HER2- aBC. No prior systemic therapy for advanced disease; prior adjuvant AI+/-CDK4/6i with recurrence within 12 mo of completion excluded; prior fulvestrant/SERD excluded.

Out of scope: paclitaxel + bevacizumab +/- atezolizumab in hormone-refractory or life-threatening-metastases HR+/HER2- mBC; no prior chemo for advanced disease (taxane allowed if >6 mo since last dose). PD-L1 centrally assessed. No canonical class fit (chemo + anti-VEGF + checkpoint inhibitor); flagged investigational.

ctDNA-guided early switch trial: patients on 1L AI + CDK4/6i for >=6 mo without progression but with emergent ESR1 mutation are randomized to switch to AZD9833 (camizestrant) + CDK4/6i vs continue AI + CDK4/6i. ESR1mut is a mandatory enrollment biomarker.

Imlunestrant vs investigator's choice endocrine monotherapy vs imlunestrant + abemaciclib in ER+/HER2- aBC after AI +/- CDK4/6i. Prior chemo (except neo/adjuvant), fulvestrant, ER-directed investigational drug, PI3K/mTOR/AKT inhibitor excluded. Drug class set to SERD oral (lead Arm A vs B comparison); Arm C combination is SERD oral + CDK4/6i; ESR1mut subgroup pre-specified.

GB491 (lerociclib, novel CDK4/6 inhibitor) + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- aBC after progression on prior endocrine therapy; up to 1 prior chemo line for advanced disease allowed. Prior fulvestrant, everolimus, or any CDK4/6i excluded. Any menopausal status.

Dato-DXd vs investigator's choice chemo in inoperable/metastatic HR+/HER2- BC after progression on and unsuitable for further endocrine therapy and 1-2 prior chemo lines in advanced setting. Prior topo-1 ADC and TROP2-targeted therapy excluded.
Abemaciclib+fulvestrant vs placebo+fulvestrant after progression on prior CDK4/6i+ET (advanced or adjuvant). Postmenopausal or OFS. No prior MBC chemo; no prior fulvestrant/SERD/PI3K/mTOR/AKTi.
Out of scope: SNF-2 molecular-subtype-restricted IIT of PD-L1 antibody (SHR-1316) + CDK4/6i + nab-paclitaxel + endocrine therapy; novel immunotherapy combo with no canonical drug-class match.

Head-to-head ribociclib vs palbociclib (+ letrozole or fulvestrant) in HR+/HER2- with PAM50 HER2-enriched or basal-like intrinsic subtype. CDK4/6i-naive. Biomarker-stratified design (intrinsic subtype).

Phase III XZP-3287 (CDK4/6i) + letrozole/anastrozole vs placebo+AI, first-line in postmenopausal HR+/HER2- MBC. No prior systemic therapy for MBC; CDK4/6i- and mTORi-naive; excludes recurrence within 12 mo of (neo)adjuvant endocrine therapy.

Phase III TQB3616 (CDK2/4/6i) + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in 'previously untreated' HR+/HER2- ABC. Pre/postmenopausal allowed; detailed prior-therapy exclusions not in available eligibility excerpt.

TQB3616 (CDK2/4/6i) + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in previously treated HR+/HER2- ABC. Allows up to 1 prior line of rescue chemotherapy OR endocrine therapy in the metastatic/recurrence setting; prior CDK4/6i status not specified.

FCN-437c (CDK4/6i) + letrozole or anastrozole ± goserelin vs placebo+AI±goserelin, first-line HR+/HER2- ABC. No prior systemic therapy for MBC; adjuvant ET allowed if DFS>12 mo; brief AI/goserelin <=28 d prior allowed.

Gedatolisib (pan-PI3K/mTOR) + fulvestrant ± palbociclib vs SOC (alpelisib+fulvestrant or fulvestrant) after PD on CDK4/6i + nonsteroidal AI. <=2 prior endocrine lines; no prior chemo/ADC for advanced disease; no prior PI3K/AKT/mTOR. Stratified by PIK3CA status.

Inavolisib + fulvestrant vs alpelisib + fulvestrant in PIK3CA-mutated HR+/HER2- MBC post CDK4/6i+ET. <=2 prior systemic lines in mBC; <=1 line chemo in mBC permitted; no prior PI3K/AKT/mTOR. Excludes adjuvant-CDK4/6i relapses with PD>12 mo post-completion if no MBC treatment received.

Vepdegestrant (ARV-471) PROTAC ER degrader monotherapy vs fulvestrant after 1 prior CDK4/6i+ET line and <=1 additional endocrine line. Endocrine duration >=6 mo required. No prior chemo for adv/MBC; no prior fulvestrant/elacestrant/SERD/SERCA/CERAN/mTOR/PI3K/AKT/PARPi. ESR1mut pre-specified subgroup.
Phase II/III SPH4336 (CDK4/6i) + letrozole vs placebo + letrozole, first-line HR+/HER2- LA/MBC. No prior systemic therapy in advanced setting; CDK4/6i-naive; pre/peri-menopausal require goserelin.
Phase III GB491 (CDK4/6i) + letrozole vs placebo + letrozole, first-line HR+/HER2- LA/MBC. No prior systemic antitumor therapy; CDK4/6i-naive; no prior chemo for locoregional/metastatic disease.

Phase II/III SPH4336 (CDK4/6i) + endocrine therapy (letrozole or fulvestrant) vs placebo + ET in HR+/HER2- LA/MBC that progressed on prior CDK4/6i + ET. Population/title indicates post-CDK4/6i; detailed inclusion language sparse in eligibility excerpt.

DB-1303/BNT323 (trastuzumab pamirtecan; novel HER2 ADC) vs investigator's choice chemo (capecitabine/paclitaxel/nab-paclitaxel) in HER2-low (IHC1+ or 2+/ISH-), HR+ MBC after progression on ET. Either PD on CDK4/6i+ET within 6 mo of 1L, or >=2 prior endocrine lines +/- targeted therapy. No prior chemo for MBC.

Phase 2 PF-07220060 (CDK4-selective inhibitor) + fulvestrant vs investigator's choice (fulvestrant or everolimus+exemestane) after PD on prior CDK4/6i + NSAI. No prior chemo in advanced setting; no prior everolimus or investigational agents.

Phase III BL-B01D1 (EGFR x HER3 bispecific ADC with topoisomerase-I payload) vs physician's-choice chemo (eribulin/vinorelbine/gemcitabine/capecitabine) in HR+/HER2- MBC after 1-2 prior chemo lines and prior endocrine, CDK4/6i, and taxanes. Novel target (EGFR/HER3 ADC) so canonical class = investigational (other).

Out of scope: SNF1/SNF3 molecular-subtype-restricted precision treatment trial (fluzoparib, everolimus, fulvestrant, abemaciclib in subtype-tailored arms) after CDK4/6i progression. Multi-arm design with no single canonical drug-class assignment.

Phase IIIb single-arm 2-cohort Chinese bridging study of capivasertib + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- LA/MBC after recurrence/progression on prior endocrine therapy ((neo)adjuvant within 12 mo, or LA/MBC ET). Mirrors CAPItello-291 with AKT-pathway subgroup.

Phase III IV albumin-bound sirolimus (nab-sirolimus, mTOR inhibitor) + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- LA/MBC after 1-2 prior systemic lines including >=1 ET + CDK4/6i. Excludes prior PI3K/AKT/mTOR, fulvestrant, oral SERD/PROTAC. Combination (mTORi + fulvestrant) does not match canonical 'everolimus + exemestane'; tagged investigational (other).

Phase III oral SERD D-0502 vs fulvestrant in previously treated ER+/HER2- LA/MBC after recurrence on/after adjuvant endocrine therapy or progression after 1-2 lines of systemic endocrine therapy. Excludes prior SERD/SERCA. Prior CDK4/6i not explicitly addressed.
